result.stdout:
A tool for working with Dolittle Events

Usage: doaudit [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  compare        Compares two MongoDb servers and reports the differences to an
                 ouput json file
  content        Subcommand related to Content and readmodels
  events         Produces a human-readable audit log from a specified Dolittle
                 event stream
  reset          Completely resets an event handler stream. Restart your
                 application for the changes to take effect
  resetdatabase  Completely resets an event store database. Restart your
                 application for the changes to take effect
  snapshot       Takes a snapshot of current event processing status from the
                 Runtime
  trim           Removes unused EventHandlers and corresponding streams from all
                 event stores
  watch          Monitors the runtime database for eventhandler activity. CTRL+C
                 to stop

Run 'doaudit [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
A tool for working with Dolittle Events

Usage: doaudit [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Commands:
  compare        Compares two MongoDb servers and reports the differences to an
                 ouput json file
  content        Subcommand related to Content and readmodels
  events         Produces a human-readable audit log from a specified Dolittle
                 event stream
  reset          Completely resets an event handler stream. Restart your
                 application for the changes to take effect
  resetdatabase  Completely resets an event store database. Restart your
                 application for the changes to take effect
  snapshot       Takes a snapshot of current event processing status from the
                 Runtime
  trim           Removes unused EventHandlers and corresponding streams from all
                 event stores
  watch          Monitors the runtime database for eventhandler activity. CTRL+C
                 to stop

Run 'doaudit [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Compares two MongoDb servers and reports the differences to an ouput json file

Usage: doaudit compare [command] [options]

Options:
  --version                                     Show version information.
  -c|--configuration-file <CONFIGURATION_FILE>  Path to a comparison json file
  -o|--output-file <OUTPUT_FILE>                Output filename
  -f|--format                                   Whether to output formatted json
  -?|-h|--help                                  Show help information.

Commands:
  createconfig                                  Create a skeleton json
                                                configuration for comparing two
                                                MongoDb Servers. Instructions
                                                embedded

Run 'compare [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Subcommand related to Content and readmodels

Usage: doaudit content [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  findvalue     Find all occurences of field=value in all Readmodels
  readmodels    Displays a list of presumed Readmodels
  unique        Checks if a field value only appears once in a selected
                readmodel

Run 'content [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Subcommand related to Content and readmodels

Usage: doaudit content [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  findvalue     Find all occurences of field=value in all Readmodels
  readmodels    Displays a list of presumed Readmodels
  unique        Checks if a field value only appears once in a selected
                readmodel

Run 'content [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Find all occurences of field=value in all Readmodels

Usage: doaudit content findvalue [options]

Options:
  --version                     Show version information.
  -f|--field-name <FIELD_NAME>  Name of field that contains the value to find
  -v|--value <VALUE>            The value you're interested in
  -i|--include-ids              Show the ID of each of the documents matching
                                the value
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>     MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>              MongoDb Port
                                Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                  Show help information.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Checks if a field value only appears once in a selected readmodel

Usage: doaudit content unique [options]

Options:
  --version                                 Show version information.
  -r|--read-model-name <READ_MODEL_NAME>    Name of the readmodel to inspect
                                            across all tenants
  -f|--field-names <FIELD_NAMES>            Comma-separated list of field names
                                            for which the record should be
                                            unique
  -i|--include-content                      Include the Content node of the
                                            duplicated entry
  -o|--output-file-name <OUTPUT_FILE_NAME>  Saves different documents in the
                                            given json file
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                 MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                            Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                          MongoDb Port
                                            Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                              Show help information.

result.stdout:
Events v1.0.0 - Copyright 2021 Dolittle AS

Produces a human-readable audit log from a specified Dolittle event stream

Usage: doaudit events [options]

Options:
  --version                                  Show version information.
  -d|--project-folder <DOLITTLE_FOLDER>      Path to the HEAD of the Dolittle
                                             Microservice where (but not
                                             including) your .csproj file can be
                                             found
  -eh|--event-handler-id <EVENT_HANDLER_ID>  EventHandler GUID
                                             Default value is:
                                             00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.
  -es|--event-store <EVENT_STORE>            EventStore Collection Name, i.e.
                                             'eventstore_02'
  -w|--with <WITH>                           Field values to include as output
                                             from the 'Content' node of the
                                             events
  -m|--muted                                 Mute output. Does not display even
                                             stream in the console under
                                             processing
  -o|--out-file-name <OUT_FILE_NAME>         Save results to file. The Filename
                                             must end with one of the supported
                                             extensions:
                                             ---
                                             .json for plain JSON output,
                                             .xslx for Excel document,
                                             .csv for a Comma-delimited file
                                             ---
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                  MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                             Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                           MongoDb Port
                                             Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information.

commands.payload:
Events v1.0.0 - Copyright 2021 Dolittle AS

Produces a human-readable audit log from a specified Dolittle event stream

Usage: doaudit events [options]

Options:
  --version                                  Show version information.
  -d|--project-folder <DOLITTLE_FOLDER>      Path to the HEAD of the Dolittle
                                             Microservice where (but not
                                             including) your .csproj file can be
                                             found
  -eh|--event-handler-id <EVENT_HANDLER_ID>  EventHandler GUID
                                             Default value is:
                                             00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.
  -es|--event-store <EVENT_STORE>            EventStore Collection Name, i.e.
                                             'eventstore_02'
  -w|--with <WITH>                           Field values to include as output
                                             from the 'Content' node of the
                                             events
  -m|--muted                                 Mute output. Does not display even
                                             stream in the console under
                                             processing
  -o|--out-file-name <OUT_FILE_NAME>         Save results to file. The Filename
                                             must end with one of the supported
                                             extensions:
                                             ---
                                             .json for plain JSON output,
                                             .xslx for Excel document,
                                             .csv for a Comma-delimited file
                                             ---
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                  MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                             Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                           MongoDb Port
                                             Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Completely resets an event handler stream. Restart your application for the changes to take effect

Usage: doaudit reset [options]

Options:
  --version                                  Show version information.
  -eh|--event-handler-id <EVENT_HANDLER_ID>  The EventHandler GUID to reset
                                             Default value is:
                                             00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.
  -r|--read-models <READ_MODELS>             Comma-delimited list of ReadModel
                                             Collection names to drop as part of
                                             the operation
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                  MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                             Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                           MongoDb Port
                                             Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                               Show help information.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Takes a snapshot of current event processing status from the Runtime

Usage: doaudit snapshot [options]

Options:
  --version                  Show version information.
  -m|--markdown              Output as markdown
  -i|--include-finished      Include EventHandlers that have reached the end of
                             the Event Log
  -e|--empty                 Include EventHandlers where no events have been
                             processed
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>  MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                             Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>           MongoDb Port
                             Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help               Show help information.

Removes unused EventHandlers and corresponding streams from all event stores

  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                       MongoDB server instance, name
                                                  or IP
                                                  Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                                MongoDb Port
                                                  Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                                    Show help information.

result.stdout:
doaudit v1.0.20 copyright Dolittle AS

Monitors the runtime database for eventhandler activity. CTRL+C to stop

Usage: doaudit watch [options]

Options:
  --version                                 Show version information.
  -d|--project-folder <DOLITTLE_FOLDER>     Path to the HEAD of the Dolittle
                                            Microservice where (but not
                                            including) your .csproj file can be
                                            found
  -r|--refresh-interval <REFRESH_INTERVAL>  How long to keep events (in seconds)
                                            before clearing
                                            Default value is: 5.
  -db|--mongo-db <MONGO_DB>                 MongoDB server instance, name or IP
                                            Default value is: localhost.
  -p|--port <PORT>                          MongoDb Port
                                            Default value is: 27017.
  -?|-h|--help                              Show help information.
